zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Greystoke於1140年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾格利姆斯索普時，她的父親Walter Greystoke32歲，母親Beatrice de Folketon30歲。她和Robert FitzHugh至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於大約1177年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Greystoke于1140年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾格利姆斯索普时，她的父亲Walter Greystoke32岁，母亲Beatrice de Folketon30岁。她和Robert FitzHugh至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于大约1177年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Greystoke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Graystock
meanings: English: locative name, from Greystoke (Cumb), recorded as Graystock in 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Greystoke was born in 1140, in Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Walter Greystoke, was 32 and her mother, Beatrice de Folketon, was 30. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Robert FitzHugh. She died about 1177, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Greystoke est née en 1140, à Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Greystoke, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Folketon, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Robert FitzHugh. Elle est décédée environ 1177, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Greystoke 1140 in Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Greystoke 32 und ihre Mutter Beatrice de Folketon 30. Sie hatte mit Robert FitzHugh mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1177 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Greystoke è nata il nel 1140 nel Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Walter Greystoke, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Beatrice de Folketon, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Robert FitzHugh. Morì circa 1177, nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Greystokeが1140年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアグリムスソルペで生まれた時，父Walter Greystokeは32歳，母Beatrice de Folketonは30歳であった。彼女はRobert FitzHughとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1177年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Greystoke(이)가 1140년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 그림스소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Greystoke(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice de Folketon(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Robert FitzHugh(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1177년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Greystoke nasceu em 1140, em Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter Greystoke, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice de Folketon, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Robert FitzHugh. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1177, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Greystoke родилась в 1140 г. в местности гримстаурп, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Walter Greystoke было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Folketon, 30. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Robert FitzHugh. Она умерла около 1177 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Greystoke nació en 1140, en Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter Greystoke, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Beatrice de Folketon, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Robert FitzHugh. Murió aproximadamente 1177, en Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 38 años.
